seed_instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations.
org_constraint: The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must contain four paragraphs.
instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations. The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences. The response must contain four paragraphs.
response:
To begin the celebration, transform the living room into a magical wonderland with colorful balloons and streamers. Hang a large "Happy Birthday" banner across the main wall to create a festive focal point. Scatter some shimmering confetti on the floor to add a touch of sparkle to the atmosphere.

For the entertainment, organize a classic scavenger hunt where children search for hidden plastic treasures. You can also set up a "musical chairs" game to keep the high energy flowing. Finally, provide a dedicated craft station where every guest can decorate their own paper crown.

The snack table should feature a variety of kid-friendly favorites like mini sandwiches and fruit skewers. Serve small cups of juice and a large bowl of crunchy popcorn for easy grazing. A colorful cake with sprinkles will serve as the delicious centerpiece for the dessert course.

Ensure that there is a designated area for children to sit and relax between activities. Provide plenty of water to keep everyone hydrated throughout the afternoon of fun. These simple steps will guarantee a memorable and joyful birthday experience for the little one.<turn|>
judged_response:

For the entertainment, organize a classic scavenger hunt where children search for hidden plastic treasures. You can also set up a "musical chairs" game to keep the high energy flowing. Finally, provide a dedicated craft station where every guest can decorate their own paper crown.

The snack table should feature a variety of kid-friendly favorites like mini sandwiches and fruit skewers. Serve small cups of juice and a large bowl of crunchy popcorn for easy grazing. A colorful cake with sprinkles will serve as the delicious centerpiece for the dessert course.

Ensure that there is a designated area for children to sit and relax between activities. Provide plenty of water to keep everyone hydrated throughout the afternoon of fun. These simple steps will guarantee a memorable and joyful birthday experience for the little one.
